tool.name: compute_risk_score
tool.description:
Compute enriched risk score for a finding going beyond raw CVSS.
Returns score 0-100, risk tier (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW/INFO), remediation priority (P0-P4), and factor breakdown showing how each input contributed.
Call this for every finding before create_vulnerability_report — clients need 'fix this FIRST' ordering that CVSS alone can't provide.
Factors: - cvss_score base (0-10 scaled to 0-35 points) - reachability: unauthenticated (+25) / authenticated (+12) / internal (+5) / unreachable (-10) - data_sensitivity: credentials (+18) / phi (+15) / payment (+15) / trade_secret (+12) / pii (+10) / none (0) - blast_radius: infra (+22) / all_tenants (+18) / single_tenant (+5) / single_user (0) - business_criticality: critical (+10) / high (+6) / medium (+3) / low (0) - exploit_maturity: in_the_wild (+15) / weaponized (+8) / working_poc (0) / poc_theoretical (-5) - compliance_flags: +4 per flag (PCI, HIPAA, SOC2, GDPR)

parameter.name: data_sensitivity
parameter.description: none / pii / phi / payment / trade_secret / credentials
